message:
fix(core): advance commit clock for non-concurrent explicit write transactions

Non-concurrent explicit transactions with writes were not advancing the
commit clock, causing time-travel snapshots to potentially reuse stale
sequence numbers from prior commits. This could lead to visibility
issues where different commits appeared to have the same sequence.

Fix: Call advance_commit_clock() in the else branch when
txn_has_pending_writes is true but the transaction is not concurrent.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
